global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, main message, supporting text, and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their spending with a call to action to shop.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main graphic area
elements.description: A central area with abstract shapes, including an oval and a square, in a light orange color.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Track every euro' in a clear, modern font, centrally placed within the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that says 'Built for peace of mind', in a complementary font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now', designed to stand out.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element with a small area, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small element at the top of the ad, possibly decorative, with no clear identification.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown advertiser, unknown vertical, interstitial format, minimalist with warm tones, key elements include a logo, main message, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message and supporting text are centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: EarnPath, Track every euro, Built for peace of mind, Shop now
